home.intro: Click or tap an element — its card with the 3D/2D atom structure and properties appears on the side.

periodicTable.title: Periodic table
periodicTable.hint: Hover or tap an element — its card appears on the side.

search.placeholder: Search by symbol, name, or number…

wizard.title: Let's tailor this to you
wizard.subtitle: Pick a level — it controls content depth and how things are explained. You can switch anytime.
wizard.changeAnytime: You can change this later via the graduation cap icon in the header.

beginner.title: Beginner
beginner.description: Starting from scratch. Tooltips and friendly explanations for every term.

school.title: School
school.description: Grades 5–11. Standard chemistry curriculum without overload.

university.title: University
university.description: Full content: organic chemistry, mechanisms, spectra, kinetics.

molecule.title: Molecule viewer
molecule.empty: No matches — try a different name

glossary.title: Glossary
glossary.intro: Short definitions of chemistry terms. Tell me if anything is missing.

lab.title: Virtual lab
lab.intro: Pick a container, drop reagents from the inventory into it. If a known reaction matches — you'll see it. If not — the app honestly says "reaction unknown".
lab.selectFirst: Pick a container on the table first

reaction.label: Last reaction
reaction.none: Nothing happened yet. Try mixing reagents or heating the contents.

unknown.label: Reaction unknown
unknown.description: This combination isn't in our database. We don't invent products — it's better to say "don't know" than show fake chemistry.
unknown.beginnerHint: Try a different pair, or adjust the temperature — some reactions only kick in when heated.

lab.inventoryEmpty: Nothing matches — try a different name

quests.label: Quests
quests.pickOne: Pick a quest below — the app will explain the goal and verify the result.

element.empty: Pick an element from the table
